comments: Approved after validating tasks/v0.6-kickoff-review-packet.json, tasks/v0.6-kickoff-packet.md, tasks/v0.6-scope-and-milestone-map.md, and tasks/v0.6-risk-register.md. Criterion 1 is satisfied because tasks/v0.6-kickoff-packet.md explicitly states V0.6 is a brand-new iteration and not a patch or amendment to V0.5. Criterion 2 is satisfied because the V0.5 carry-overs Path Resolution Fragility, Reviewer Output Delivery, and Approval Gating Automation are explicitly imported in the kickoff packet and carried into the milestone map. Criterion 3 is satisfied because the scope explicitly includes repository normalization/cleanup, docs center creation, 1-click install/bootstrap work, and comparative analysis with /Users/mlabs/Programs/labs-teamwork-spec. Criterion 4 is satisfied because V0.6-M5 and V0.6-M6 are explicitly defined in tasks/v0.6-scope-and-milestone-map.md and marked mandatory in the kickoff packet. Criterion 5 is satisfied because the current working tree is limited to the V0.6 kickoff artifacts in tasks/, with no implementation file or directory changes detected. Criterion 6 is satisfied because the kickoff packet and milestone map preserve the gated workflow discipline: M1 is definition/review only, M2-M6 remain under the Contract -> Review -> Implementation -> Review -> Closure model, and advancement is conditioned on review approval before execution proceeds.
